title: festuca cinerea subsp. caesia
intro: Festuca cinerea subsp. caesia, also known as blue fescue, is a perennial grass species belonging to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca cinerea subsp. caesia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to soothe respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
